Called looking for a lawyer for disability.  The woman on the phone, Cynthia, who was giving me a pre-screening was extremely rude and seemed like it was annoying her to have to try and help.  Despite not being the actual lawyer and not even being able to say the name of my disability let alone understanding what it is she became very condescending and told me she didn't think I would get approved based on my age.   Mind you she knew nothing about my actual medical history because she was too rude for us to get that far.  I final decided this was not the law firm for me and decided to search elsewhere.  Horrible way to treat a potential client.
Was a different aquantive than her father Bob Richardson a bit abrasive for a injury attorney for me  .

reviews.text: Was referred to this office from Legal Shield at the beginning of February and after not hearing from them I reached out to them 2/11/26 and Lynn or Lynnette answered and I inquired about begin referred to this office and she said nothing was received so I needed to contact Legal Shield again. I did so and I still did not hear back and so I called again 2/16/26 and the same lady answered and said it still wasn’t received. I asked if she could call them and gave her my referral number, which she said she did contact them and is waiting for the referral still. She calls back 2/17/26 and said it was finally received and proceeded to ask questions on what it was regarding. She cut me off quite frequently and was just unprofessional. Once she found out I reside in Bell County and the case is Coryell County she again cut me off and said they don’t service those counties. I stated that it’s very frustrating that if she would’ve just taken the time to ask a few simple questions when I initially called I would’ve have known earlier that even with a referral they would not be able to assist and she responded that she wasn’t required to ask questions. I simply stated that it may not be required but if you just take your time to ask certain questions if would result in a better customer experience. Needless to say, I’m thankful that if the front desk is this unprofessional, I’m glad it wasn’t a good match.
Took 300k from my family then never went to trial. Thanks.

Not only are they Nice staff; but also
A  very  intelligent staff.

took three years to get a no! and hurry in to get your paperwork!
Great office staff.

Find a different Lawyer!
The staff at this law firm seemed quite friendly and helpful at first.  These traits are completely useless, however, when you need them to actually return a call and provide legitimate legal advice.  After being named in a lawsuit, I contacted this firm and they asked that I provide copies of several documents pertaining to the case.  I did and called to confirm that they had received everything they needed the following day.  The secretary (I presume) said they had received everything and would have Mr. Fanning look it over. A week later I called to follow up and remind them that the deadline for an answer was quickly approaching.  They said they thought Mr. Fanning had looked at the information and they would have him call me.  He did not. So, I called again the next day.  This time they took a message and said they would call me back.  Needless to say, they never called back and I knew I had made a mistake by waiting on them and that I needed to quickly find another lawyer.
Time is short already when having to provide an answer in a lawsuit.  Don't make the the mistake of using a law firm that assures you they will look into your problem and then simply ignore you when a deadline is the following Monday.
Exceptional firm for all types of litigation and legal work - highly experienced and patient
Came by to drop off some documents. Tasha at reception was attentive and made sure everything got where it needed to go. Simple but appreciated.
They show great care for you and make themselves overly available to you through some of your most difficult times. Highly experienced and very confident as well. Highly recommend.

Jimmy Herring is amazing. I highly recommend. I am not sure why the one star reviews. They must have the wrong number. I have always been able to contact someone and get answers. Even if the firm can’t help your case they have directed my family and friends to the right place to get what they need. Again, I highly recommend.

Are they any good? They could be the best, but I wouldn't know. I literally, explained my disappointment (as a whole) with law firms regarding not returning calls, and kindly asked that this be relayed to the attorney in the field needed. Nope. Nada. No reply to my inquiry whatsoever.  I'm baffled that there is no concern over reviews, word-of-mouth, etc. Best of luck to others.
I want to talk...
I cant recommend Deaconson enough.  Forever indebted

I soon discovered that I could not handle such an important endeavor on my own. A friend recommended Mr. Alford and I am grateful to God that I was led to David. He has handled my case with compassion and concern. Contacting Mr. Alford is the best thing that I could have done for my family.
Never returned my phone call😥

I had an excellent experience with The Thompson Law while handling my personal injury case involving Fred Loya Insurance. From start to finish, the team was professional, responsive, and truly supportive during a stressful time.

Bianca Garza was outstanding in coordinating and assisting with my medical treatment, she made sure everything was handled smoothly and kept me informed every step of the way. Anna Raposo, the negotiator paralegal, did a fantastic job advocating for my case and ensuring the process moved forward efficiently. A special thank you to Brittany Montes De Oca, who closed the case professionally and made sure everything was wrapped up clearly and without complications.

The entire team showed genuine care, strong communication, and attention to detail. I felt supported and confident throughout the process. I highly recommend The Thompson Law to anyone looking for a reliable and dedicated personal injury law firm.
reviews.ownerResponse:

Providing clear guidance, strong advocacy, and genuine support is always our goal, and it’s wonderful to know you felt confident and well cared for throughout the process. reviews.text: I’m thankful that I made the right choice to go with Thompson Law To handle my auto accident Case. Definitely grateful for them, and also their patience with me. I would be remiss if I didn’t mention these names because all of them did a great job and were very important in seeing my Case through to the end: Frankie Villalobos, Jason Staples, Cindy Ramirez, Becky Villareal, Crystal Sanchez, Kyle Shortall, Isabel Fiscal, Sarai Moran, and the whole client care team(Please forgive me if I left any names out, I’m definitely grateful for you as well). reviews.text: I sought GWLS for help with an adoption. The process began early in 2023. I was told we should wait for six months because we just moved back to Texas. I hired Ms. Dove, paid for the service in full, and waited the six months. Once the waiting period was over I visited the office and called Ms Dove repeatedly to no avail. I finally opened a case with the State Board which forced the communication. The owner asked for another opportunity - I didn’t want to start over. All I wanted was to finalize the adoption. The adoption finally happened December 2024. There is one last thing I have been waiting to receive for over a year - the new birth certificate from Georgia. Again calls and emails to Ms Dove were not returned. I took upon myself to contact Georgia about the birth certificate and come to find out - they never received the request. I let Ms. Dove know what I learned and what Georgia required. Her response was “that explains why we haven’t received anything - I thought I sent everything off” - this response from her after a year of waiting. She said she would have the documents for me to pick up. When I went to get the documents - all documents were not there or I didn’t know what each item was. I am waiting again for phone calls or emails. I don’t know what else to do. The receptionist is very good at her job by keeping people at bay but how does this help me? I do refer this service to people because not everyone can afford expensive lawyers, but I also caution them about how GWLS conduct business. I pray I never have to use GWLS again.

Really bad! I will never recommend. They barely keep in touch with you. They don't call They dont give update. Basically you are on your own. Ms. Rachel Dove has not done much.  I am very disappointed

reviews.text:
I called Zimmerman Law Firm because their website clearly says they handle certain types of cases — but when I reached out, the front desk acted completely confused and rude about it. The receptionist was unprofessional and had an attitude the entire time, like she couldn’t be bothered to answer simple questions.

If the firm doesn’t actually offer the services they advertise, they really need to reword their website because it’s misleading. It’s crazy — do you guys handle cases or not? Are you an actual law firm or just passing people around? The lack of communication and attitude from the receptionist made the whole experience feel like a joke. Definitely not how a professional law office should treat potential clients.
reviews.ownerResponse:
We sincerely apologize for your recent experience and appreciate you taking the time to share your concerns. What you described is not the level of professionalism or courtesy we expect from our team, and we are taking your feedback seriously.

We want to ensure every client receives clear and respectful communication about their legal needs. If you're willing, we’d greatly appreciate the opportunity to speak with you directly to clarify what happened and see how we can help. Please don’t hesitate to reach out to one of our partners, such as Gavin or JD, at (254) 752-9688 — they would be glad to personally assist you.

Thank you again for bringing this to our attention.

In the end, The Zimmerman Law Firm worked tirelessly to ensure I received fair compensation for my injuries and the challenges I’ve faced since the incident. The outcome exceeded my expectations, and I am truly grateful for everything they did for me.

If you are ever in need of a law firm that will stand by your side, advocate for you, and handle your case with both skill and heart, I highly recommend The Zimmerman Law Firm. They went above and beyond for me, and I am so thankful for their work.

reviews.text: Best lawyer in town

I’m incredibly grateful to Attorney Jason for taking the time to speak with me today. My mom received a very convincing scam call claiming she had missed jury duty and had a warrant out for her arrest. It was terrifying. Jason listened patiently, asked the right questions, and helped us realize it was a scam.

As it turns out, his own mom had gotten the exact same call earlier that day — so he knew firsthand how real it sounded. He reassured us, explained what to do next, and gave us peace of mind during a stressful moment.

Thank you, Jason, for your kindness, professionalism, and calm guidance. You saved us from unnecessary panic, and we truly appreciate your help.

Jason Milam is a well-educated double Baylor graduate (undergraduate degree and Law School degree) who has quickly become one of the best attorneys in the state of Texas.  I highly recommend him for whatever legal services you may need!

Thank you you so much for helping me in a very unknown place it's good to know that there are compassionate lawyers here who actually care about people rather than profit very high marks all the way around for this law firm

Hired Walter Reaves September 2020 to work on a case that was already as old as he was, a 2014 case. I could never get hold of him to ask about the case so I stopped making payments to get his attention in the hopes of getting a phone call. The best he could do with his 100 years of so called experience was get 6 years probation. He never investigated the case or put in an order of dismissal or anything that would have helped prove my innocence. I didn't get a phone call from this man until 2023. I wanted a trial but I refused to go in blindsided. I plead "guilty" just to get him off my case as well as having to file a grievance on him.  Finally January 2024 he was off the case. Now finally I was able to get my case dismissed with Billy Clark of Dallas who went way over and beyond and got it dismissed In less than 6 months. Walter Reaves was on my case almost 4 years and didn't do anything. His staff Brenda is very rude and argumentative with clients. Brittany did all the work and did the best she could. I wouldn't recommend Walter Reaves to represent anyone nor do I recommend him to people of color. He is another Baylor Law school graduate like EVERYONE else in McLennan county. They all do the same thing like robots. If you are a POC I recommend Billy Clark. Don't waste your money with Walter Reaves he will get you nothing but set offs all to try to get you probation or prison. It's not worth it at all.

UPDATE TO REPLY:
I appreciate the offer to reach out to the office, but my reply was over six months ago. Unless you are giving me a partial or full refund, I have no desire to reach out. My review still remains the same. I would not recommend this law office to represent an injured turtle. If you would like to talk about giving me some of the 4,000 and some odd dollars back, I have no reason to contact. My case was dismissed with Billy Clark of Dallas, not Walter Reaves.

reviews.text:
I had a PAID consultation with Brittany to discuss a child custody case. A year later Brittany took on the opposing party as a client. She signed a contract with them and took several thousands of dollars to do so. She even had the nerve to call my attorney ant the time and ask for permission to take on the opposing party as a client. I absolutely declined and she still proceeded to take them on and took their money. I spent an hour telling her everything about my case for her to turn around and try to use it for the opposing party. Do not trust this lawyer with your children or with any matter.

Update:
Per her response in the reviews you will see where she states she keeps accurate records yet as I stated she did check her records. That is precisely why it was so much worse Brittany. You called my attorney at the time to ask for permission to work against me as you knew we had already had a paid consultation prior and I told you no. You may not take them on as a client and YOU STILL PROCEEDED. You signed a contract and took several thousands. Google reviews are for the public. They are not for your benefit. People deserve to know the truth to make a wise decision especially when it comes to children. FYI not everyone puts their full legal name on google for privacy reasons. You know this.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Lannen Law completed conflict checks before every consult and maintains records for our cases and consults going back to 2015. We have no records of anyone with your name in our system and no knowledge of any instance where the situation you are describing has occurred.

Please attempt to resolve this or any issue by calling our office instead of posting a review without ever talking to us.

UPDATE: I still do not know who this is as I have NEVER taken money from a client and then asked to represent a party against them.

reviews.text: Just called to see about a consultation. $250 just to come in and consult with someone. Pure ridiculous.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Mr. Powell, we are one of the most sought-after Firm's in central Texas. People set appointments with us solely for the purpose of conflicting us and making sure they don't have to go against us in Court. The consult fee is an attempt to ensure you actually want to hire us and aren't just trying to keep us from winning the case for the other side. Moreover, phone consults are only $100.00. The fee is for the same purpose but allows the consultation to be a little cheaper for a prospective client.

Finally, I would ask you to consider whether any doctor would agree to see you and diagnose your illness without a fee. Our time and expertise are our product. At some point, we do expect to be paid for our services. Typically, a person who cannot afford a consultation fee cannot afford the hourly rate. It gives us some indication of a client's ability to afford our services. I wish you luck in your case which will affect the rest of your life, but which you are willing to entrust to the lowest bidder and needs your business enough to meet with you for free.

Ryan Law Firm, in particular Saba Toor has helped my family navigate the special education system with a local school district. Her knowledge of special needs for our children in public schools is unmatched. She is skilled at bridging the necessary experts to the table enabling well rounded; fair assessments to devise effective plans. Saba did not hesitate to attend IEP meetings and take a lead role in our ARD meetings.  She has an amazing drive and heart to ensure our children not only get their needs met but what they are legally entitled to. My child is now thriving and I can advocate for my child with confidence.

After two and a half years of tirelessly advocating for 504 accommodations and attending numerous IEP and ARD meetings alone for our autistic and blind son, I was emotionally and mentally exhausted. Facing continued resistance from the public school system, I knew I needed help.

Hiring Saba Toor was the turning point we desperately needed. Her approach was a breath of fresh air after seasons of struggle. Saba’s personal experience and deep understanding of special education law equipped her to navigate the complexities of our situation with empathy and precision.

My only regret is not seeking her assistance sooner. If you are considering legal support, I encourage you to move forward without hesitation. Saba is not only knowledgeable and professional but also deeply compassionate and committed to supporting children with diverse abilities. She made a world of difference advocating for our son’s educational needs in the public school.

She kept me informed about the progress of our case and explained each step in a way that was easy to understand. I highly recommend Saba Toor to any family in need of a special education attorney.

reviews.text: Earlier this year, I ended up needing legal assistance in a very serious matter in the Waco area. As everyone knows, the legal process is complex and extremely intimidating, and it is difficult to know everything that has to be done and when, but if you don't get it all done right and on time, it can potentially wreck your life. On the basis of web searches, word of mouth, and the firm's four generation history in Waco, I retained attorney Gerald Villarreal and legal assistant Rhonda Maher at Dunnam & Dunnam. Gerald and Rhonda were both stellar, and it was entirely due to their efforts that I navigated the process successfully, and emerged with a much better outcome than I could possibly have had otherwise. At every stage of this process, their extensive knowledge of law and procedure, their timeliness and attention to detail, and their connections and professional reputation were clear to see, and these made the difference in the outcome. I also had some handicaps and difficult circumstances that complicated my case, and they were able to work with the relevant authorities to accommodate these conditions. Retaining Dunnam & Dunnam generally, and Gerald and Rhonda specifically, was by far the best thing that I did in this situation. I will be forever deeply grateful for their work on my behalf, and I highly recommend them to anyone needing the services of an attorney in the Waco area.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you, Troy, for sharing your experience and mentioning attorney Gerald Villarrial and legal assistant Rhonda Maher. We're glad to hear about the positive impact they had on your case. Your recommendation means a lot to us!

reviews.text: When I was in the market for an attorney, I was very intentional about making sure I found the right attorney who was an expert in the area where I needed legal counsel. I immediately got online to begin my search for legal representation by reading reviews and talking to attorneys I knew to see who they recommended. After I read multiple reviews online and spoke with several attorneys I knew, I narrowed my search down to Mason Dunnam with Dunnam and Dunnam, Attorneys at Law. Mason was personally vetted and came highly recommended from multiple sources. In my experience, Mason was very thorough throughout the process and always followed up with answers to my questions. He was very patient and explained legal jargon in a way that I was able to understand without making me feel inferior. He knew about the laws and policies that were pertinent to my case. Most people know attorney fees can easily rise and become expensive. In this situation, I did not believe I should be bargain shopping since I was dealing with legal matters and desperately trying to protect myself and my business. With Mason Dunnam, you get what you pay for. As expensive as it might seem, he is worth every penny. If needed again, I would use Mason without a doubt. His secretary was also very personable and professional. I stand behind Mason Dunnam and highly recommend him.

reviews.text: They could possibly be the best legal council in the state. I wouldn't know. Why? NO RETURN CALL, ON-LINE CONTACT INQUIRY, OR TEXT! Friday, March 1, 2024 - Called their office. Debriefed the receptionist. I was told that Nicole would call me back in the afternoon. Never happened, but things come up. Called on Saturday just to leave a VM, politely asking with emphasis for my call to be returned on Monday. Legal matters can often be pressing, and I need to know whether to look elsewhere. Not too much to ask. No return call on Monday. Monday afternoon, I fill out the on-line contact form, AND email the website listed receptionist email. Nothing. Re-sent the same email the next day. It is a SERIOUS no-brainer that word of mouth is a POWERFUL tool regardless of whether you are selling snow cones, homes, or legal council. I can afford your service. I can afford your retainer (if necessary), and my need is simplistic. Baffled as to how ANYONE can justify zero reply. Best of luck to those trying to utilize their representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: We sincerely apologize for the lack of communication you experienced. We understand the urgency of legal matters and the importance of timely responses. Hired April of 2024 to represent me on a 11 year old case. I paid 7,300 cash upfront. Before I gave Kyle a dime he was helpful and seemed to be understanding of my identity theft situation. He never looked at evidence or compared anything. He honestly didn't show he cared after he got the money. I later  found out the DA did t even want to take the case to trial so you would think that was an indicator for him to move in and file a motion to dismiss. He never did that at all. He worked with the DA to try to get me 3 years probation. I agreed to it just to see how you would react and he was all too thrilled for my liking. I wind up firing Kyle 2 days before my September court date and I hired Billy Clark of Dallas to get the job done. Billy Clark got on the job and did his investigations,which Kyle never did, and got my case dismissed!!! Do not trust these Baylor Law school graduates because they scratch each other's backs. A MUST READ:
As someone whos NEVER been in trouble a day in my life, getting a 2nd degree Felony Assault Charge was shocking and quite honest absurd right out the gate. I felt set up from jump, and having found out that my original court appointed attorney had a personal relationship with "alleged victim"(something he kept hidden for 9mths) made everything worse. Understandably by that point i trusted no one or nothing that had to do with the courts or this case at this point. So by the time i was switched over to attorney Kyle King I was timid, anxious and very high strung. My anxiety always got the best of me, and the conversation always ended with me upset and in tears, but I remember the first time speaking with Kyle. I was very on edge, upset, and frustrated at the entire situation. As i explained my position and everthing that happened that night.  In a very calm and understanding demeanor Kyle reassured me that everything would be fine and that he would be there with me every step of the way, leaving me with a sigh of relief. I finally felt like i had someone in my corner who would go above and beyond fighting for me. Upon reviewing the case Mr. King saw that it wasnt exactly the "alleged victims" narrative that resulted in these charges, but he let me know that as much as I wanted a dismissal it a was a great chance that it wouldnt be. Of course the courts were adamant that they wouldnt dissmiss it, but that never stopped him from trying. During this time my ptsd and anxiety was at a all time high, and simply bringing the case up caused panic attacks and crying spells. Regardless Kyle understood why, never making me feel bad. Finally after months Kyle called me with the great news that he got it dropped down from a 2nd degree felony assault charge to a misdemenor assault charge, & i was offered PTIP(Pre Trial Intervention Program). Months past and he kept me updated every step of the way. I was accepted into the program with agreed upon drug test, community service, along with an anger management course. Finally after months of waiting i went to submit first urine test, when to my surprise I was held(what felt like hostage)in their office, refusing to let me leave & go to my car to grab my wallet(all over $20). I called Kyle immediately, but he couldn't answer due to being in court. So i texted to let him know what was happening and he literally STOPPED what he was doing, walked over to where i was, (knowing i was more than likely having a panic attack) & came tore them a new one, & let them know that under no circumstance would they EVER treat his client as so. He further explained that I was under no court order to be there, & how its illegal to hold me there against their will. A few hours later Kyle called to check on me to make sure i was good. Words can not express how grateful i am for Mr. King, He is the most professional, understanding, no bs attorney that you didnt know you needed. If you get into any kind of trouble, Regardless of what any other attorney might say RUNNN DONT WALK TO KYLE KING!!!!
Very professional and was true blessing to have Mr. King as my attorney, I would truly recommend him to family and friends..
Kyle King is an excellent attorney and exceptional person. He went above and beyond to help me in my time of crisis. I would highly recommend his services.

reviews.text: My brother suffered from severe depression and was originally receiving SSDI.  He tried to return to work but was unsuccessful in holding a job due to his severe mental health. He recently was diagnosed with kidney failure along with more health conditions where he could not maintain employment. He was no longer able to pay his medical bills, maintain a residence, or support himself.  Out of frustration, wits end, and many doors shut in his face, he researched and connected with Merryl Jones for assistance.  After selecting Merryl Jones to represent him and providing all the necessary requested medial and personal documents, he waited for some type of response.  After many phone calls and left messages to Merryl Jones office, my brother became more depressed and his mental and physical health declined. My brother only wanted a follow up response and case status from Merryl Jones office and staff as this was his last resort.  As Merryl Jones indicated on her website, she has a 98 percent approval rate and my brother waited and waited for a positive response.  My brother would always inform me of his endless attempts to contact Merryl Jones office to no avail or response.  As a result of these actions, my brother literally took a gun and blew his brains out in January of this year.  Two weeks ago, I was notified by two local detectives that my brother’s decomposed body was found in his apartment where he was in the process of being evicted.  The detectives informed me that his body had been in decay for some time.  I am SOOOO heart broken and my family are in tears because of this situation.  All my brother was asking for was some help in order to live and maintain his health.  Literally all doors were closed in his face.  Recently I contacted Merryl Jones office to inform of his suicide with no response.  I had to literally call twice with no avail.  I finally spoke to Amanda and she stated she would return my call and as of today I have not received a call.  I can only IMAGINE how my brother felt.  Please don’t let this happed to another client as my brother literally put his trust and faith in her office.  Merryl Jones was his final attempt and cry for help. A SECOND CHANCE was all he wanted.
reviews.ownerResponse: I mourn for you and your family in the loss of your brother.  I understand from our communications that you are processing a lot of emotions right now. I will continue to pray for healing. As communicated, I will not publicly respond to the specific details of my representation and attorney-client relationship with your brother.  Please know he was never and never will be forgotten by me.

reviews.text:
I was referred to Ms Jones by a gentleman who works for the county. We spent the better part of three hours talking and me sharing my history.

She was so kind, and calm, and I felt …hopeful.
And then, we/I wait…and I was approved!   I’m so grateful to Ms Jones, and a shout out for poor (lol) Amanda, who has patiently/calmly explained details about my case *multiple* times.  Including this morning!

Fun fact:  During my interview with Ms Jones, I happened to notice a framed Bible verse hanging on the wall right over my head.

Fear not. I know the plans I have for you. Plans to prosper you and not to harm you.
I want to say Book of Jeremiah (?)

I remarked on it (that’s one of my favorite verses)and I said something along the lines of
Oh that is perfect! Must help people feel encouraged.  And she replied that it was to encourage/remind *her* that it’s going to be fine.

An arduous wait, and things are now, indeed, fine.
*Better* than fine.
I now have support and access to medical care

Just such a great team!
Thank you so much Ms Merryl Jones, and the always unflappable, patient Amanda.

Bless you all.

I encountered some major health issues over 2 years ago and as a result I'm not able to do the job I've done for the last 20 years. I was struggling with figuring out how to create income without going back to school at 59. Two of my girlfriends encouraged me to look into disability. After researching I felt the best way was to go straight to a lawyer and see what chance I had. I mean I never hurts right?

Our family lawyer recommended Merryl Jones. I met with Mrs. Jones and she thought I had a strong case. Although I did get denied the first time she fought hard for me and we won in 11 months!! And you want to know the best part? She doesn't get paid unless you win. And, she gets paid out of your earnings from back pay. It doesn't come out of your pocket. It's money you never even had. No brainer right?!!

If you have a disability and you aren't sure you have a case, give her a call. You never know!!! She might take your case too!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you! I was happy to get you approved! Enjoyed getting to know both you and your husband. I’m in the business of helping people. If I can come up with a strategy on how to show a person meets SSA’s definition of disability, then I’ll take your case and help you out!

reviews.text:

I am writing this on behalf of my husband,  Roy.  We had been struggling for two years to get his disability started, only to be denied.  We tried an advocate, which was a joke!  We were both so discouraged, so I prayed for the Lord to show us someone to help.  I found Ms Jones through the internet and read about her success, so we gave her a call.  Answered prayers for sure!  She listened to us and made us feel, for the first time,  like we had hope.  We did what she ask and she did the rest.  She was caring, professional and most important to us, honest.  As the saying goes, “if you talk the talk, you better be able to walk the walk”.  If you have no hope and want someone to help you with your disability, there is no one better than Merryl Jones!

I experienced 2 court sessions in front of a judge with Milam & Fanning and I still cant see my son to this day, and I've had them for a year now! They'll promote language like "Open Schedule" knowing there's conflict in the case, just so you'll have to came back & pay them to fight again in court, because the "custodial" parent wants to abuse the open schedule. I requested a simple mediation over legitimate parental alienation for a fixed schedule, then they tell me we HAVE TO BACK for a 3rd session in front of a judge to finish the divorce papers and get a fixed schedule... apparently meditations are not an option through these people... AND still haven't gotten the divorce papers finalized either after they said the 2nd session they would include divorce finalization... Ohh and if you work with Milam & Fanning & decide to critique their work to others on Facebook, they'll withdraw themselves from your case. They care NOTHING for you but your money. I have plenty of emails and photo evidence of how they treated me during their processes... I DO NOT RECOMMEND. THEY DO NOT CALL OUT PERJURY. THEY DO NOT CALL OUT PERJURY. THEY DO NOT CALL OUT PERJURY.

reviews.text: Milam & Fanning is certainly who I would recommend for any single parent trying to find an attorney for divorce and/or custody cases. When I first started the divorce process, I was scared and emotional, and I spoke with a few family law offices trying to find someone to help me. From the beginning, Milam & Fanning made me feel like they truly cared. Cade Bradberry was my lawyer and he always spoke with me with genuine care and never made me feel silly for any confusion I had. He did not make me feel like I was a number and another payday for him. In fact, he told me that he wanted me to be sure this was what I wanted because divorce is difficult and can be very ugly. I admired this about him from the start. Divorce and custody can be a long and tedious process with a lot of waiting and uncertainty, but Cade and the rest of the team at Milam & Fanning were sure to keep me as informed as possible, and always answered any questions I had. I always felt like they were on my side (which obviously you want in a lawyer), and that they wanted the best outcome for me and my children. The process was wrapped up in less than a year, and I'm so thankful for all they did for my family.

After two vehicle accidents, both I was rear-ended. I have reached out to this firm. My first encounter (around 2020) was great! They made sure I received the best offer, and were genuinely concerned for my overall wellbeing. I felt these attorneys really cared for their clients. Which was a great feeling after experiencing an traumatic accident. For that, I would give them 5 stars.

I am giving 2 stars resulting from my second encounter (2026) with the firm. I was disappointed and ultimately surprised at the outcome, as I received a settlement check that was pretty much "chunk change". Received no payment for my lost wages (after proper paperwork/verification was sent during my case), or pain and suffering. The attorney fee was a bit over 40%  (case did not go to trail). My case was open for 1 year and a few months. Overall, the attorney and other parties received majority (basically all, just about) of the settlement and I received the "leftovers". Which left me feeling like my pain and suffering and wellbeing didn't matter as long as they were paid. Most likely will not reach out again to this firm or refer anyone.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Arlisa, thank you for sharing your experience. We appreciate you trusting our firm after your first case, and we’re grateful to hear that you felt supported during that difficult time. We’re very sorry to learn that your second experience did not meet the same expectations. We strive to always help clients understand every part of the claims process and secure the best possible outcome based on the facts of the case and available insurance coverage. We never want any client to feel like their concerns or well-being were overlooked.

Every case is different, so there can be factors that affect how a settlement is distributed, including medical expenses. That said, we understand how frustrating and disappointing this must feel. If you’re open to it, we would like the opportunity to speak with you directly about your experience and answer any questions you may still have. reviews.text:
Words cannot express my gratitude to Dooley Noted Law, and especially Attorney Ornelas, and administrative assistants Catherine Dooley  and Ellen Ward.

I do not wish to go into the specifics of the case, but only note that the law office competently handled my case involving a consumer protection issue. Importantly, my approach was to strike the middle path and find an amicable resolution. The law office helped in that regard, and helped find a good resolution.

I had found the law office through the ARAG Legal insurance that I get from my work, and had selected them based on the reviews I saw. The initial (free) 15 minute consultation was helpful, and Attorney Ornelas sketched an approximate path of how things could evolve and what our steps would be.

I will say that we were very stressed out about the whole affair, and felt perhaps more frequent updates would help. (This was our first experience in such matters.) In retrospect, however, I feel that the nature of these cases are such that frequent updates may not be possible. (Perhaps for future clients, the Law Office may wish to make this point explicit, so that folks in a situation similar to us are reassured that the legal-wheels are moving.)

All is well that ends well, and I am very grateful that Dooley Noted Law helped find a resolution for us.
Very professional and thorough law firm

reviews.text:
This practice has completely went down hill from where it was just a year ago and it’s very unfortunate. Attorney Dooley was someone I once recommended however after dealing with one of his associates I would say you are better off spending your money with a different practice. Through out the wasted month, I never had 1 phone conversation with an attorney, paralegal, or clerk about my “case”- not even during the intake process. I called multiple times to find out if they thought they could assist with my matter, what was the plan or process…. anything about the case with promises that they could and would be able to assist and that someone would be in contact with me. I finally received an email that was more vague than anything I researched on my own from an attorney providing my intake statement and “case analysis” that ended with- this will conclude my representation of you. I was able to get more useful (and a faster) response from Google, TikTok, and AI than dealing with them.

——————————
Response to owner.

I really hope potential clients and ARAG review your response and fully understand the undertone of your message. Legal insurance is a paid service- so the implication that because I used legal insurance to hire you (not a consultation) there is a chance the service will only be subpar (which is ludicrous and again telling of where this practice is headed). In a season and career where your ethics and people skills are the only thing that set you apart- Corky Smith and his team should do better.

I will also ensure that I share your response with ARAG so they are aware being an ARAG client impacts the way you interact with you as a person.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Terrea,

We hate that we were unable to meet your expectations. We know and understand how frustrating that can be. Our goal is to assist all our ARAG Legal Insurance Members with excellence, though sometimes we don’t always hit the mark.

We are deeply grateful that you gave us a second try and wish you the best on your future endeavors!

Thank you for your feedback.

reviews.text:
I would not recommend this law firm. I tried to show some grace, but there are too many issues. For one, I had to write my own demand letter because what they sent me for approval was very basic and elementary and didn't align with my case details. Second, communication was poor. Additionally, after getting no results, they dropped my case. Currently, I have requested my case file documents and have received no response over the past couple of weeks. I will be filing a formal complaint, as I need my case documents and all communications with the defendant to continue this case pro se.

**My response to the owner's reply:

You all ghosted me, and I had to call and email multiple times without success. It took me writing this for your firm to get back to me. So don't assume I received a response within a normal timeframe or that my expectations were unreasonable. Communication was poor on your law firm's part, and you didn't care about me or my case. If I could give zero stars, I would based on your response. Just apologize and move on—don't blame the client.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Shaquille - We are sorry that you feel as if your experience didn’t align with your expectations. Unfortunately, in some situations, there is not always a path forward in a legal perspective as we discussed. We are happy to discuss this with you again and to provide as much clarity as possible.

Requests for case files can sometimes take a few weeks to prepare. Yours was delivered on the 10th calendar day after your request. Again, if this wasn’t your expectation, we understand. Happy to discuss more directly, and wish you well moving forward.

reviews.ownerResponse:
UPDATED RESPONSE: Please see below response. Specifically the part about asking a business for services they don’t offer.


——-

Hi Momo! Thanks for your feedback. Although, it appears you may have the wrong business, we do not offer interview services remote or in person. However, if you were attempting to inquire about possibly using one of the services we do offer and you wanted to meet with an attorney, it is company policy that all non-client's first meet with an attorney over the phone to determine the best possible direction. This means you weren't refused anything, you simply wanted something that Dooley Noted Law, does not offer.
That is like walking into a McDonalds, ordering a Crunchwrap Supreme, and then leaving in a tiff when instead of getting the Crunchwrap Supreme, Extra Large Baja Blast, with the 7 fire sauces as you asked for, they suggested you look at the menu of items they do have available.

Regardless, you are entitled to share your opinion of your 0 star experience. Hopefully it helped provide you the validation and affirmation you needed. At least we were able to provide you that, and the best part, free of charge!

Should you not need help with an interview, and are seeking a service we do offer, we would be happy to setup a preliminary call with one of our attorneys.

I am incredibly thankful for the outstanding support and guidance I received after my car accident, where I was rear-ended by an elderly woman while stopped at a red light. The entire experience was stressful and overwhelming, but the attorney’s office made every step of the process feel manageable.

They walked with me through each stage, explained everything clearly, and truly advocated for me. Because of their dedication, I was able to receive compensation for all the distress and impact the wreck caused. Their communication, professionalism, and compassion made a difficult situation so much easier to navigate.

Thank you so much for standing by my side and helping me find resolution. I’m very grateful for everything you did. Highly recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Wow Sanjay! Thank you so much for the kind words. We are so thankful you trusted us to walk you through this process.
Hello Capper Transport! Harrison Davis strives to serve our clients with the best service possible. Is there something we can help you with and possibly increase that rating?

Thank you Lois for your 4-star review! We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback. Although we haven't had the pleasure of working with you yet, we sincerely hope that whenever you are in need of a personal injury law firm, we'll be able to earn that 5th star. We're committed to providing the best possible experience and would love the opportunity to assist you in the future.

reviews.text: Harrison Davis Morrison Jones recently represented me in a claim against a major insurance company. The insurance company pressured me to accept a low settlement even though I had injuries that would require a long time to heal. I tried to reach a fair settlement without retaining an attorney but to no avail. After a year of getting nowhere I started interviewing law firms and attorneys. After interviewing twenty-three lawyers I had just about given up on finding one who put my interest ahead of theirs. I mentioned my problem to a good friend; someone I trusted. That is how I found Harrison Davis Morrison Jones. I arranged a meeting with one of the firm’s partners to explain what I was looking for in an attorney. He recommended Gina Long, an employee with the firm. I traveled 70 miles to interview Ms. Long and within ten minutes I knew I had found the right person to represent me. Ms. Long negotiated a settlement with the insurance company well above what I expected to receive. Without question, she put my interest before hers throughout the course of the lawsuit and acted with the highest levels of ethical standards. Felicia Truehitt, Ms. Long’s assistant, kept me informed of the status of the claim frequently and responded to my questions no later than the following day. I am thankful to have had Ms. Long on my side because she relieved a huge stress problem in my life and attained a far better outcome than what I would have done on my own. Based on my experience , I highly recommend the Harrison Davis Morrison Jones law firm if you need legal representation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for trusting us and for the very kind words.

reviews.text: Very helpful. Thorough. Compassionate. They were recommended to us by a previous client. And with their help, they made the best out of our situation. I wish I could give 100 stars, because they worked so hard for our case.

reviews.text: Absolutely amazing! I can’t express the joy in my heart for this firm. When I got into my accident, the amount of initial stress was almost overwhelming. I thought to myself “There is no way I can take on all of the challenges this accident caused, and still have work and all the stressors of my everyday life.” When Harrison Davis Morrison Jones took my case it felt like the weight of it all was off of my shoulders. They always looked after my best interest, they always answered my calls, they always called when something new happened, they always were straight shooters and walked me through everything I didn’t understand. Most importantly, they listened to me and made me feel like I was someone they have always known and took care of me when I was down on my luck. I will always remember what they have done for me and I hope to repay them someday. A special thanks to Gina Long and Felicia Truett who were both absolutely brilliant and I hold them in very high esteem. If you’re ever in need, look no further this is the firm for you!

reviews.text: Where do I begin? I talked to several different attorneys in the Waco area and all of them (three total) just didn't seem to connect with me. They all seemed to just want a bunch of money and it felt like they didn't genuinely care about me or my case at all. So, I started asking around and one name came up time after time and that was Will Hutson. So I found his website and filled out the contact form online and Mr. Hutson himself called me the following morning to schedule a meeting. During the consultation I could tell that Will knew the law as he had answers to all of my questions without judging me. He wanted several thousand dollars to represent me but he told me that I could retain him for 50% down and that I could pay the rest out. He was very easy to talk to and for every question I had, he had an immediate answer. One of the other attorneys I met with wasn't sure about one of my questions and said they would have to "look up the answer!" This was without a doubt a red flag for me and so I left that office and never looked back. I decided to go with Mr. Hutson and I am so glad that I did. From day one, he and his paralegal stayed in contact with me. They returned my phone calls and emails promptly. Will explained to me in detail exactly what was going to happen with my case. He was spot on and everything he told me turned out to be true. This is something that you don't find in an attorney most of the time which I believe is why most people hate them. What started off to be one of the worst events in my life ended up being okay and I owe it all to Will Hutson. He is without a doubt one of the BEST attorneys out there. He takes your case serious and will fight for the best outcome. He was worth every penny I paid him.

reviews.text:
Remove all comments about my active case if not I will a complaint with. State Bae of Texas and purse legal malpractice suit. attorneys can face severe disciplinary action, ethical violations, and sanctions for posting about active cases—including specific litigation like appliance defect lawsuits—on social media.
While attorneys are allowed to advertise their services, their freedom to discuss ongoing cases is heavily restricted by rules of professional conduct.
Here is a breakdown of why this happens and what constitutes "trouble" in this context:
1. Breach of Confidentiality (ABA Rule 1.6)
The Rule: Lawyers must protect all information relating to client representation.
The Problem: Posting details about a case, even anonymized, can lead to the identification of a client or reveal confidential strategy.
Consequences: Disciplinary action, including suspensions, for disclosing too much information, especially without client consent.
2. Prejudicing an Adjudicative Proceeding (ABA Rule 3.6 - Trial Publicity)
The Rule: A lawyer cannot make extrajudicial statements that they know will have a "substantial likelihood of materially prejudicing" a court proceeding.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi, Jamaal.

There is no confidential information about your case posted publicly.

Again, we’re sorry you were displeased with our work. You have the right to petition the bar. You have a right to express your frustrations publicly, as you have. We are also entitled to respond as we have and inform future attorneys what they may encounter in representing you.

If you would like our response removed, removing the initial review it was posted under should automatically remove the response.

reviews.text: My name is Rafael Magallanes. I hired this law firm for three citations I received in McLennan County. I have called and reached out multiple times and I have never spoken to my actual attorney. I paid them in full upfront, knowing that my tickets should be dismissed Due to lack of evidence and accusations. I have been requesting the body cam and dash cam footage through this Attorney and have been given nothing but the runaround. By law, they are entitled to getting that footage if requested through discover. Instead, they are trying to charge me $2000 for each citation to go to trial when in reality they don’t even need to do any of that. They should have gotten the body cam and dash cam footage right off the beginning in order for them to see that my case will be thrown out immediately. The paralegal lady, I speak to on the phone that tells me about my court. Dates is very rude disrespectful and acts like a smart ass. This is by far the worst attorney I’ve ever hired and I’ve been pulled over many times in my life since I’ve achieved my license back in 2011.  My Civil Rights Attorney has been trying to contact them as well to request the footage during that traffic stop that I hired them for representation. In small towns and counties like this tends to be a ton of corruption, it wouldn’t surprise me if they are preventing me from having that footage when they are supposed to be my defense attorney. I am a general contractor I own a construction company in Dallas Fort Worth, Metroplex. I do not recommend this attorney.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hi Mr. Magallanes. I wanted to clarify a couple points in your review. First of all, while it did take quite some time for the prosecutor's office to provide us with the body cam and dash cam footage, we called you as soon as we had received them and examined them--two business days after we were given access to those files. In that call, we scheduled a time for you to come into the office to view them yourself. Also in that call, you expressed no discontentment with our services, and you said that our staff answered all the questions you had short of seeing the videos yourself. However, you did not come into the office on the day of your appointment and have offered no explination as to why.

Second, while must charge for our services, we made it clear to you that we would not charged for a trial unless you decided to go to a trial. At no time have we told you that we would charge you for something that we do not plan on doing.

Third, in your review you said that your civil rights attorney had been trying to contact us, but we have no record of any calls or emails from him until the day that you left your review.

Fourth, we train our staff extensively on how to speak appropriately with clients over the phone and in person. However, that does not mean that they are expected to receive a bad attitude from anyone, including our clients. We look forward to a ongoing, amicable attorney-client relationship as we continue to represent you on this matter.

Both John and Garrett were extremely professional and courteous with me and my father. They were both extremely patient with me as to my never ending questions and returned my calls as promptly as possible.
Based upon my interactions with John and Garrett, as representatives of JHS LLP for needs of seniors, I highly recommend this firm.
Great experience.  Could not ask for better performance in the services I required.  Highly recommend.

In starting a non-profit, Garrett Beach and the team at Johnson Hobbs Squires LLP brilliantly made the process easy and efficient! Working with legal documents, these details matter and it was more than comforting to know I was working with brilliant experts AND excellent quality assurance! Garrett was excellent - patient with all my questions and confident to work with! I had a great experience!
Got advice...followed it. Will return.

I would highly recommend Johnson Hobbs Squires.  The staff is very friendly and the attorneys are very knowledgeable. They worked efficiently to prepare our documents and they were able to make the whole process simple for us.

Garrett Beach was extremely helpful in advising us what all was needed for us as parents to feel comfortable that everything would be completely taken care of for our son and daughter in law.  He patiently answered all of our questions and made very helpful suggestions when needed.  He even suggested a document, we knew nothing about,  that was definitely needed because we own our own home. Our documents came organized in a  beautiful binder for safe keeping.  Our overall experience was simply great!

Although I initially dreaded updating my estate plan, Garrett Beach & Mark Hobbs made the process understandable & smooth.  They responded promptly to my situation & questions.  I found it a pleasure to meet with them in their offices located in a beautiful historic building in downtown Waco.  I highly recommend Johnson Hobbs Squires LLP.

I needed an assistance with an estate issue that involved a property in Texas and I live in California.  A friend of mine referred to me Johnson Hobbs Squires LLP and I am so thankful they did.  The service that I received was professional, quick. and courteous...from start to finish.

A special thanks to Garrett B. who kept me updated every step of the way.  If I ever needed a law firm in Texas again my one and only call would be to Johnson Hobbs Squires LLP.  I have told all of my family and friends in Texas about their service.  They are truly a top notch firm!
I use them for my small business needs and personal questions. Always great services!

The Helton Law Firm is a great group of people. After I was injured at work I tried to deal with workers comp and their doctors on my own, that turned-out to be a big mistake, they did not have my best interest in mind to say the least. The insurance company and their doctors decided that my injury was not cover under workman's comp and denied my claim. I lost my job do to not being able to work. After that I hired Mr. Helton to handle my case. He and his staff were awesome they made the whole process of dealing with the state and workers comp easy. The law firm won my case so I was able to get backpay, future payments and the treatment that I need. Stephen Carl is, without a doubt, one of the most exceptional individuals I’ve ever had the privilege of working with — not just as a lawyer, but as a person. His knowledge, professionalism, and thoroughness are unmatched. He approaches every case with care, clarity, and an unwavering commitment to doing what’s right.

Stephen, alongside John Palmer, represents everything you’d hope for in legal representation: integrity, compassion, and relentless advocacy. These two are not only incredibly sharp and strategic, but also genuinely kind and deeply invested in their clients’ well-being.

If you’re facing a custody battle, divorce, or any family law matter, I cannot recommend them enough. You will feel supported, protected, and seen. They are the gold standard in their field — truly the best of the best.

John Palmer and everyone I have worked with at this firm have been helpful and patient throughout the process. I would recommend this firm to anyone I know that need good legal representation.

The law office of Bruce Perryman handled my husbands disability case. We had been trying for years to get through the system and had been denied. They gathered records and met with us to discuss the specifics of our case. They were easy to contact, quick at returning calls and were attentive to details.  We were very nervous about the process but they helped ease our nerves by addressing our concerns. They helped us navigate the process and win our case. We are very grateful for their services and would highly recommend them. They are down to earth people and super easy to talk to.
A very positive experience! Please see my comments below.

Mr. Perryman was able to probate my mother's estate accurately and expeditiously. He took what was a very complicated situation to us and made it seem effortless.  Furthermore, since Mr. Perryman has limited overhead, a client will get more access to an actual experienced lawyer and for a very good price. Highly recommended!

I am sharing my mom's review of this amazing law office.  My mom has CRPS, fibro, as well as some other medical issues brought about due to CRPS.  Bruce and Carleen are the best. Thanks so much Bruce and Carleen for helping my mom!  We appreciate you!

My lawyer
I call them ask for an appointment the Lady say will call me and I never heard from them

I had a terrible experience with attorney Carlos Diaz. The communication was not as professional as I would expect from a legal representative. I recently required legal assistance for what I believed to be a straightforward matter—a simple traffic ticket with clear evidence to contest it. Based on my experience, I lacked confidence in Carlos Diaz’s approach and felt that the level of advocacy did not meet my expectations. I would have reservations about entrusting even such an easy case to this attorney again.

They decided to repeal from my case after I exposed them for having to go for a third time to court to get a fixed schedule between me and my son. Let's start with my experience; David said he'd be 15 minutes before our first session to talk about how things generally work in court... dude pulls up last minute and says nothing, all dude did was open the door and pull out my seat. Pathetic. They treated my case like some kind of package deal behind closed doors, already determining the result before the judge sees anything about the case. They claimed over email we were to finalize the divorce papers on the second session... never happened. Can't even hold up to their word. I've been experiencing complete parental alienation having these people for a full year, and then they told me we have to go back to court for a 3rd session JUST to get a fixed schedule for my son, like that couldn't have happened the first two sessions along with finalizing the divorce papers. Find elsewhere, family law is not a strength with these people apparently. 0 avocation for my rights as a Father, just taking everything for face value from the mother, and somehow the judge believes it all, the lawyers, the attorneys, all of them, without proof.

David and his team did great. Allison was amazing as well. We had 3 battles all the same case and David did his thing and we won every single challenge we faced. I would highly recommend him and his team of trusted experts !

Working with Mr. Fanning and his team was an absolute blessing. They guided us with honesty, wisdom, and confidence, making a stressful process feel manageable. We felt supported and cared for from start to finish. Highly recommend!

David, Allison, and Bobbi were incredible to work with. After looking into several attorneys, we chose David based on his reviews—and after our first consultation, it was an easy decision. He was clear, direct, and gave us a realistic view of what to expect.

Things got complicated pretty quickly, but David and his team handled everything head-on and with urgency. They were always kind, responsive, and never made us feel like a burden—despite the many (many) questions we had along the way. Family law is emotional and overwhelming, especially when kids are involved, but they made us feel supported every step of the way. It was clear our daughter’s best interest was always the priority, and that meant everything.

We got the outcome we were hoping for and are so grateful to have had them in our corner. Thank you again, David and team. You truly made a hard process easier.

Absolutely recommend, made the whole process hassle free would not recommend any other family law attorneys best in Waco. David was absolutely helpful will do exactly what he tell you. Once again thank you for all the help.

David did exactly what he said he would do. Him and his team are all amazing! Professional and just all around great people. Thank you for all your hard work and helping my daughter with her divorce and child custody❤️

I couldn't have asked for a better lawyer to guide me through my divorce case. From the very beginning, David Fanning demonstrated unwavering dedication to my case, ensuring that my interests were well-represented. Not only did I win the house, but my lawyer also meticulously acted upon all of my requests and concerns. Their expertise, professionalism, and attention to detail made a challenging process as smooth as possible. I'm truly grateful for their support and highly recommend their services to anyone facing a divorce. Thank you for helping me secure a brighter future
Doesn’t answer the phone. Paid for 5 star reviews.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Brandon,

We are available to take your call now. Our office is regularly open and answered by one of our actual staff members Monday through Friday, 8a to 5p.

Communication and response time are priorities for our firm. For current clients, Mr. Fanning gives out his personal cell phone.

All our reviews are from real people who are either clients or worked with us in some other capacity.

Please give us a call so we can meet and evaluate your case.

Thanks for answering all of our crazy questions and ensuring that we got everything we wanted in the end.
Truly the Best lawyer and staff.  If you ever need a Family Lawyer I recommend Mr. Fanning and his staff.

Absolutely amazing people! They were there for me through thick and thin on my case, and went the extra mile to help me out even after the case was over! Highly recommend them! Big props to Alan Streetman for handling my case as well!

David Fanning and his team were very professional and hard workers. While going through a divorce is not the easiest especially with kids, the team made it a smooth transition. They were always available and willing to listen and answer any questions that I had. In the end, David Fanning worked hard to get what I wanted and what was best for my kids and myself.

David Fanning has your back but is also a straight shooter. I always felt like I knew where I was with my situation.

Mr. Fanning is a professional and very responsive. The reviews were true, they really finish cases and work hard! I would definitely recommend him to you and your family!

David has always been very helpful and easy to talk to. He has fought hard for me through a custody battle and also through a divorce.
